purpose: Test whether the description should trigger for robust plan-implement-review-fix workflows and not trigger for trivial requests.

queries.query: Use a plan/implement/review/fix loop to update this feature safely.
I have five related tasks; coordinate them with subagents and fix review findings before finalizing.
Please do an adversarial review of this draft, fix the issues, then review again.
Implement this data cleanup script and validate it carefully; mistakes would be costly.
Create a polished report from these sources, with iterative critique and citation checks.
Run PIRFL on this backlog of independent tasks.
Say thanks to Alex in one sentence.
Make a quick haiku about rain.
Summarize this one paragraph in a sentence.
